subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name, the Self-Subsisting, through which Thou didst give glad tidings unto Thy servants and didst make it sovereign over [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک القیوم الذی به بشرت عبادک و جعلته قیوما علی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment
